rules.name: Martial Grace
rules.effect:
At the start of the battle round, you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.
Each time a unit from your army performs the Swift as the Wind Agile Manoeuvre, until the end of the phase, add an additional 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
Each time a unit from your army performs an Agile Manoeuvre that involves rolling a D6, add 1 to the result.

stratagems.name: Lightning-fast Reactions
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ASURYANI unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.
stratagems.summary: Embark non-engaged ASURYANI unit wholly within 6" of transport

stratagems.name: Feigned Retreat
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an ASURYANI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Fell Back unit can shoot and declare charge this turn

stratagems.name: Blitzing Firepower
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 12". If such a weapon already has that ability, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.summary: Grant [SUSTAINED HITS 1] to ranged weapons targeting enemies within 12"; if already has [SUSTAINED HITS 1], unmodified 5+ scores Critical Hit instead

stratagems.name: Fire and Fade
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT, ASURMEN and WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) has shot.
stratagems.cond: That ASURYANI unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to D6+1"

stratagems.name: Webway Tunnel
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield, place in Strategic Reserves (if not in Engagement Range of enemies)

enhancements.name: Phoenix Gem
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Timeless Strategist
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Gift of Foresight
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Psychic Destroyer
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

rules.name: Skilled Crews
rules.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by Aeldari Vehicle models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability and you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for Aeldari Vehicle Fly units from your army.

stratagems.name: Layered Wards
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army.
stratagems.cond: That AELDARI VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Feel No Pain 5+ vs mortal wounds

stratagems.name: Swift Deployment
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI TRANSPORT unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.
stratagems.summary: Units disembark from TRANSPORT after it Advances; count as having made Normal move; cannot charge this turn but act normally otherwise

stratagems.name: Vectored Engines
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That AELDARI FLY VEHICLE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Shoot after Fall Back this turn

stratagems.name: Cloudstrike
stratagems.timing: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and is in Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Deep Strike ability. When your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but if it does, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. In addition, if your unit is a TRANSPORT, each unit that disembarks from it this turn must be set up more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units and until the end of the turn, is not eligible to declare a charge.
stratagems.summary: Deep Strike anywhere >6" from enemies; can't charge this turn. Disembarking units also >6" from enemies and can't charge this turn

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll made for a model in your unit. If you are using fast dice rolling, you can select one of those rolls to re-roll before moving onto the next step of the attack sequence.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll per attack sequence

stratagems.name: Anti‑grav Repulsion
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that can FLY and was selected as a target of that charge.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: -2 to Charge rolls for target enemy unit

enhancements.name: Guiding Presence
enhancements.effect: AELDARI PSYKER model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Harmonisation Matrix
enhancements.effect: AELDARI model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
enhancements.effect: AELDARI PSYKER model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly AELDARI VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Guileful Strategist
enhancements.effect: AELDARI model only. If your army includes the bearer, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three AELDARI VEHICLE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Ride the Wind
rules.effect:
In the Declare Battle Formations step you can set up ^^Asuryani Mounted^^ and ^^Vyper^^ units in Reserves.
During the battle, such units can be set up on the battlefield as if they were arriving from Strategic Reserves. For the purposes of setting up ^^Asuyani Mounted^^ or ^^Vyper^^ units from your army on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

In addition, at the end of your opponent's turn, you can select a number of ^^Asuryani Mounted^^ or ^^Vyper^^ units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units), then remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as shown below:

■ Incursion - 1
■ Strike Force - 2
■ Onslaught - 3


^^Windriders^^ units from your army gain the ^^Battleline^^ keyword.

stratagems.name: Death From on High
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was set upon the battlefield from Reserves this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls for unit's attacks until end of phase

stratagems.name: Overflight
stratagems.timing: End of your Shooting phase or the end of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 7".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 7"

stratagems.name: Wind of Blades
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Eligible to shoot and declare charges after Advancing or Falling Back this turn

stratagems.name: Daring Riders
stratagems.timing: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting up your unit on the battlefield from Reserves, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if your unit is set up within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.
stratagems.summary: Set up from Reserves anywhere >6" from enemies; if set up within 9" of enemies, cannot charge this turn

stratagems.name: Focused Firepower
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Improve AP by 1 on unit's attacks

stratagems.name: Spiralling Evasion
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI MOUNTED or VYPER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
stratagems.summary: Grant 4+ invulnerable save to unit

enhancements.name: Firstdrawn Blade
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

enhancements.name: Mirage Field
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Seersight Strike
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI MOUNTED PSYKER model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the [anti-monster 2+] and [anti-vehicle 2+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Echoes of Ulthanesh
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI MOUNTED model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent’s deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

rules.name: Shepherds of the Dead
rules.effect:
Each time an Asuryani Psyker model from your army is destroyed by an enemy unit, that unit gains a Vengeful Dead token. Each time a Wraith Construct model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit with one or more Vengeful Dead tokens, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
Asuryani Psyker models from your army have the following ability:
Spirit Guides (Aura): while a Wraithblades, Wraithguard or Wraithlord unit from your army is within 12" of this model, that unit has the Battle Focus ability.


Wraithblades and Wraithguard units from your army gains the Battleline keyword.

stratagems.name: Seer’s Eye
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI PSYKER model from your army and one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of it that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your PSYKER model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Armour Penetration and/or Damage characteristics of that attack.
stratagems.summary: Ignore AP/Damage modifiers vs selected enemy unit

stratagems.name: Wraithbone Armour
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units] that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: Subtract 1 from Damage of all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Blades From Beyond
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] to unit's melee weapons

stratagems.name: Soul Bridge
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit from your army and one ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD unit is considered to be within 12" of your PSYKER model for the purposes of the Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides abilities.
stratagems.summary: WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHGUARD or WRAITHLORD considered within 12" of your PSYKER for Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides

stratagems.name: Spirit Token
stratagems.timing: Start of your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One WRAITHBLADES or WRAITHGUARD unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
stratagems.summary: Objective marker stays controlled until opponent's Level of Control exceeds yours

stratagems.name: Crushing Strides
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase, just after a WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit from your army ends a Charge move.
stratagems.cond: That WRAITHBLADES, WRAITHLORD or WRAITHKNIGHT unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each WRAITHBLADES model in your unit, or roll four D6 if your unit has the WRAITHLORD keyword, or roll six D6 if your unit has the WRAITHKNIGHT keyword: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: Roll D6 per WRAITHBLADES model (4 if WRAITHLORD, 6 if WRAITHKNIGHT) in Engagement Range of enemy unit; each 3+ inflicts 1 mortal wound

enhancements.name: Light of Clarity
enhancements.effect: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of INFANTRY models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of MONSTER models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Stave of Kurnous
enhancements.effect: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding TITANIC units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [precision] ability.

enhancements.name: Rune of Mists
enhancements.effect: SPIRITSEER model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18", models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Higher Duty
enhancements.effect: SPIRITSEER model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

rules.name: Defend at All Costs
rules.effect: Each time a Dire Avenger, Guardian, Support Weapon or War Walker model from your army makes an attack, if that model's unit and/or the target unit are within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Warding Salvoes
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls when attacking enemies near objective markers

stratagems.name: Shield Nodes
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is within range of one or more objective markers, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Wound rolls if unit is within range of objective markers

stratagems.name: Vaul’s Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army.
stratagems.cond: One WAR WALKERS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: After that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).
stratagems.summary: Shoot back at attacking unit after their attacks resolve

stratagems.name: Time to Strike
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One STORM GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Unit Advances 6" instead of rolling; can shoot and charge after Advancing this turn

stratagems.name: Blades of Asuryan
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PISTOL] ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant [PISTOL] to unit's ranged weapons

stratagems.name: Cost of Victory
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One GUARDIANS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When doing so, return every destroyed GUARDIANS model to your unit.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield to Strategic Reserves; return all destroyed GUARDIANS models

enhancements.name: Craftworld’s Champion
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Ethereal Pathway
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two GUARDIANS units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Protector of the Paths
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. While the bearer is leading a DIRE AVENGERS or GUARDIANS unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

enhancements.name: Breath of Vaul
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI model only. While the bearer is leading a STORM GUARDIANS unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re-roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a fusion gun in that unit, you can re-roll the result.

rules.name: Acrobatic Onslaught
rules.effect: Each time a **^^Harlequins^^** model from your army makes a Charge move, it can move through enemy models.

rules.name: Travelling Players
rules.effect:
**^^Troupe^^** units from you army gain the **^^Battleline^^** keyword and **^^Troupe^^** models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2.
You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: **^^Death Jester**^^, **^^Shadowseer**^^, **^^Troupe Master**^^.

stratagems.name: Staged Death
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
stratagems.summary: Set destroyed model back up near where destroyed, not within Engagement Range of enemies, with half starting wounds

stratagems.name: Heroes’ Fall
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Destroyed models that haven't fought this phase: roll D6, on 4+ fight before removal

stratagems.name: Mocking Flight
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HARLEQUINS unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That HARLEQUINS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: Fell Back unit can shoot and declare charge this turn

stratagems.name: Tricksters’ Retort
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One TROUPE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6"

stratagems.name: Bloody Dance
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.
stratagems.summary: Declare charge against selected enemy units; resolve immediately

stratagems.name: Exit the Stage
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield; place into Strategic Reserves

enhancements.name: Cegorach’s Coil
enhancements.effect: TROUPE MASTER model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer’s unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

enhancements.name: Mask of Secrets
enhancements.effect: HARLEQUINS model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

enhancements.name: Murder’s Jest
enhancements.effect: DEATH JESTER model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, each successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Mistweave
enhancements.effect: SHADOWSEER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

rules.name: Strength From Death
rules.effect:
Lethal Intent
At the end of your opponent's Shooting phase, if one or more Ynnari units from your army were destroyed this phase, select one Ynnari Infantry or Ynnari Mounted unit from your army that was within 6" of your destroyed unit. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".


Lethal Surge
Once per turn, when a Ynnari unit from your army performs the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre, it can make a Lethal Surge move instead of a Normal move. If it does, roll one D6 and add 1 to the result: that unit can be moved a number of inches up to the total. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of the enemy unit that just triggered that Agile Manoeuvre.


Lethal Reprisal
At the start of the Fight phase, select one Ynnari unit from your army (excluding Titanic units) that is below its Starting Strength. Until the end of the phase, that unit has the Fights First ability.

rules.name: Servants of the Whispering God
rules.effect:
You can include Ynnari units in your army, even though they do not have the Asuryani Faction keyword.
Asuryani units (excluding Epic Heroes) from your army gain the Ynnari keyword.
You must include Yvraine and/or The Yncarne in your army, and one of those models must be your Warlord.

stratagems.name: Pall of Dread
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.cond: One YNNARI unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
stratagems.summary: Objective marker stays under your control until opponent's Level of Control exceeds yours at phase end

stratagems.name: Macabre Resilience
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One YNNARI INFANTRY or YNNARI MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Wound rolls on incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Emissaries of Ynnead
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after a YNNARI INFANTRY unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: That YNNARI INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1; re-roll any Hit roll if unit below Starting Strength

stratagems.name: Parting the Veil
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One YNNARI unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Destroyed models that haven't fought this phase can still fight, then removed

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One YNNARI unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
stratagems.summary: Grant [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] to unit's ranged weapons

stratagems.name: Death Answers Death
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One YNNARI unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units), if one or more models in that unit were destroyed this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagems.summary: Unit shoots out of phase

enhancements.name: Gaze of Ynnead
enhancements.effect: FARSEER model only. The bearer’s Eldritch Storm weapon has the [devastating wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Storm of Whispers
enhancements.effect: WARLOCK model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Borrowed Vigour
enhancements.effect: ARCHON model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Morbid Might
enhancements.effect: SUCCUBUS model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

rules.name: Strands of Fate
rules.effect:
At the start of the first battle round, you generate Fate dice by rolling a number of D6 based on the battle size, as shown below. Keep your Fate dice to one side - this is your Fate dice pool.


■ Incursion - 3
■ Strike Force - 6
■ Onslaught - 9


Each time you use one of the detachment Stratagems, if your Fate dice pool contains one or more Fate dice showing the corresponding value in the table below, you can discard one of those corresponding Fate dice. If you do, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.




■ Presentiment of Dread - 1
■ Forewarned - 2
■ Unshrouded Truth - 3
■ Fate Inescapable - 4

■ Isha's Fury - 5
■ Psychic Shield - 6

stratagems.name: Presentiment of Dread
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit within 18" takes Battle-shock test at -1

stratagems.name: Forewarned
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls and Wound rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Unshrouded Truth
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.summary: Remove from battlefield; redeploy more than 9" from all enemies

stratagems.name: Fate Inescapable
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Grant [IGNORES COVER] to unit's ranged weapons; +1 AP on Critical Wounds

stratagems.name: Isha’s Fury
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: Roll 6D6; each 3+ inflicts 1 mortal wound on target enemy unit

stratagems.name: Psychic Shield
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
stratagems.summary: Enemy ranged attacks only effective within 18"

stratagems.name: Presentiment of Dread
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit within 18" takes Battle-shock test at -1

stratagems.name: Forewarned
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: -1 to Hit rolls and Wound rolls on all incoming attacks

stratagems.name: Unshrouded Truth
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.
stratagems.summary: Remove from battlefield; redeploy more than 9" from all enemies

stratagems.name: Fate Inescapable
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Grant [IGNORES COVER] to unit's ranged weapons; +1 AP on Critical Wounds

stratagems.name: Isha’s Fury
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI PSYKER model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: Roll 6D6; each 3+ inflicts 1 mortal wound on target enemy unit

stratagems.name: Psychic Shield
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly ASURYANI PSYKER models.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
stratagems.summary: Enemy ranged attacks only effective within 18"

enhancements.name: Lucid Eye
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

enhancements.name: Runes of Warding
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the [devastating wounds] ability.

enhancements.name: Stone of Eldritch Fury
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Torc of Morai-Heg
enhancements.effect: ASURYANI PSYKER model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

rules.name: Path of the Warrior
rules.effect:
Each time an Aspect Warriors or Avatar of Khaine unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, select one of the following abilities for it to gain until the end of the phase:

■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

stratagems.name: Warrior Focus
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill, Weapon skill, Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Ignore all modifiers to BS, WS, Str, AP, Dmg, and Hit rolls for unit's attacks

stratagems.name: To Their Final Breath
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Remove Aspect Shrine token (optional); destroyed models roll D6 (+1 if token removed) on 4+ to fight before removal

stratagems.name: Skyborne Sanctuary
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASURYANI unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
stratagems.effect: If your ASURYANI unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.
stratagems.summary: Embark non-engaged ASURYANI unit wholly within 6" of transport

stratagems.name: Doom Inescapable
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One AVATAR OF KHAINE model from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Wailing Doom ranged weapon has a Range characteristic of 18" and a Damage characteristic of 8.
stratagems.summary: Wailing Doom: Range 18", Damage 8 until end of phase

stratagems.name: Preternatural Precision
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ASPECT WARRIORS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, select one of the following abilities, or select two of the following abilities if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem: [IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected abilities.
stratagems.summary: Select 1 ability ([IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS 1]) for unit's ranged weapons; select 2 if you remove an Aspect Shrine token

stratagems.name: Khaine’s Vengeance
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.cond: One ASPECT WARRIORS or AVATAR OF KHAINE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
stratagems.summary: Enemy unit takes Desperate Escape test; -1 if Battle-shocked

enhancements.name: Aspect of Murder
enhancements.effect: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the [precision] ability.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Wisdom
enhancements.effect: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Shimmerstone
enhancements.effect: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Strategic Savant
enhancements.effect: AUTARCH or AUTARCH WAYLEAPER model only. While the bearer is leading an ASPECT WARRIORS unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

rules.name: Boons of the Brood
rules.effect: Weapons equipped by ^^**Harlequins Mounted**^^ and ^^**Harlequins Vehicle**^^ models from your army have the [^^**SUSTAINED HITS 1**^^] ability. Each time a Harlequins unit from your army disembarks from a Transport, until the end of the turn, that unit’s weapons have the [^^**SUSTAINED HITS 1**^^] ability.

rules.name: Travelling Players
rules.effect:
**^^Troupe^^** units from you army gain the **^^Battleline^^** keyword and **^^Troupe^^** models in those units have an Objective Control characteristic of 2.
You can include up to three of each of the following models in your army: **^^Death Jester**^^, **^^Shadowseer**^^, **^^Troupe Master**^^.

stratagems.name: Fangs of the Brood
stratagems.timing: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One TROUPE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, when using your unit’s Dance of Death ability, you can select three of the abilities for your unit to gain, instead of one.
stratagems.summary: Gain 3 Dance of Death abilities instead of 1

stratagems.name: Venomous Wrath
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: After your unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.
stratagems.summary: After shooting, if not in Engagement Range: move up to 6"; cannot charge this turn

stratagems.name: Striking Stride
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Eligible to charge after Advancing

stratagems.name: Weavers’ Coils
stratagems.timing: End of your Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Non-engaged units make Normal move; engaged units Fall Back up to 6"

stratagems.name: Weaving Stride
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Unit makes Normal move up to 6"

stratagems.name: Skyward Lunge
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HARLEQUINS VEHICLE or HARLEQUINS MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit from battlefield and place into Strategic Reserves if not in Engagement Range of enemies

enhancements.name: Key of Ghosts
enhancements.effect: HARLEQUINS model only (excluding SOLITAIRE models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Weavers’ Wail
enhancements.effect: TROUPE MASTER model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Fanged Leer
enhancements.effect: DEATH JESTER model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

enhancements.name: Shedskin Raiment
enhancements.effect: SHADOWSEER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three HARLEQUINS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

rules.name: Yriel's Own
rules.effect: ^^**Aeldari**^^ units in your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced. In addition, each time an ^^**Anhrathe**^^, ^^**Rangers**^^ or ^^**Shroud Runners**^^ unit from your army Advances, you can re‑roll the Advance roll.

rules.name: Veterans of the Void
rules.effect: Each time you add an ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement (see right). Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown (see Munitorum Field Manual). If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

stratagems.name: Raiders’ Spoils
stratagems.timing: Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: +1 Objective Control until next Command phase

stratagems.name: Ruthless Killers
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or Fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: +1 Damage to unit's attacks

stratagems.name: Yriel’s Example
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding WRAITH CONSTRUCT units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
stratagems.summary: Grant Feel No Pain 5+ to unit

stratagems.name: No Prey Too Big
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One ANHRATHE, RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the highest Toughness characteristic of models in the target unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: +1 to Wound rolls if attack Strength < target's highest Toughness

stratagems.name: Impeding Fire
stratagems.timing: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One RANGERS, SHROUD RUNNERS or STARFANG unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) visible to and within 36" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).
stratagems.summary: -2 to Charge roll for one selected enemy unit (not TITANIC); max one modifier applies

stratagems.name: Withdraw and Reinforce
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If that unit is below Starting Strength, return all destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit.
stratagems.summary: Remove unit to Strategic Reserves; restore destroyed models (excluding CHARACTERS) if below Starting Strength

enhancements.name: Pirate Prince
enhancements.effect: PRINCE YRIEL unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.

enhancements.name: Alacritous Assault
enhancements.effect: ANHRATHE unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Exotic Munitions
enhancements.effect: ANHRATHE unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Adrenal Infusions
enhancements.effect: ANHRATHE INFANTRY unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

rules.name: Relentless Raiders
rules.effect:
While an objective marker is under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. 


^^**Anhrathe**^^ units from your army have the following ability: 


**Void Thieves:** At the end of a phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

rules.name: Veterans of the Void
rules.effect: Each time you add an ^^**Anhrathe**^^ unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement (see right). Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown (see Munitorum Field Manual). If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

stratagems.name: Pirates’ Due
stratagems.timing: The Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One AELDARI unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit has the ANHRATHE keyword, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
stratagems.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1; ANHRATHE units re-roll all Wound rolls against enemies near objective markers

stratagems.name: Lethal Ruse
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That AELDARI unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is an ANHRATHE unit, also select one enemy unit your unit was within Engagement Range of at the start of the phase, and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: Eligible to declare charge after Fall Back; if ANHRATHE, roll 6D6 vs. enemy unit in Engagement Range at phase start: 4+ each deals 1 mortal wound

stratagems.name: Outcast Ambush
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One RANGERS or SHROUD RUNNERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Sorrow

stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 1 to the roll: models in your unit move a number of inches up to this result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). abilities.effect: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: Monofilament Snare
abilities.effect: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Shadow Weaver. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit it snared. While a unit is snared, each time that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Support Artillery

This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a Transport.

abilities.name: Support Weapon

abilities.name: Sonic Destruction

glossary.name: Precision
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[PRECISION]** in their profile are known as Precision weapons. Each time an attack made with such a weapon successfully wounds an Attached unit, if a Character model in that unit is visible to the attacking model, the attacking model’s player can choose to have that attack allocated to that Character model instead of following the normal attack sequence.

glossary.name: Lethal Hits
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[LETHAL HITS]** in their profile are known as Lethal Hits weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, a Critical Hit automatically wounds the target.

glossary.name: Torrent
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[TORRENT]** in their profile are known as Torrent weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, that attack automatically hits the target.

glossary.name: Leader
glossary.effect:
While a Bodyguard unit contains a Leader, it is known as an Attached unit and, with the exception of rules that are triggered when units are destroyed (pg 12), it is treated as a single unit for all rules purposes. Each time an attack targets an Attached unit, until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, you must use the Toughness characteristic of the Bodyguard models in that unit, even if a Leader in that unit has a different Toughness characteristic. Each time an attack successfully wounds an Attached unit, that attack cannot be allocated to a Character model in that unit, even if that Character model has lost one or more wounds or has already had attacks allocated to it this phase. As soon as the last Bodyguard model in an Attached unit has been destroyed, any attacks made against that unit that have yet to be allocated can then be allocated to Character models in that unit.

Each time the last model in a Bodyguard unit is destroyed, each CHARACTER unit that is part of that Attached unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time the last model in a CHARACTER unit that is attached to a Bodyguard unit is destroyed and there is not another CHARACTER unit attached, that Attached unit’s Bodyguard unit becomes a separate unit, with its original Starting Strength. If this happens as the result of an attack, they become separate units after the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks. 

Each time a unit that is part of an Attached unit is destroyed, it does not have the keywords of any other units that make up that Attached unit (unless it has those keywords on its own datasheet) for the purposes of any rules that would be triggered when that unit is destroyed.

glossary.name: Battle Focus
glossary.effect:
If your Army Faction is ^^Asuryani^^, at the start of the battle round, you receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the battle size, as shown below:


■ Incursion - 2
■ Strike Force - 4
■ Onslaught - 6


Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section of your codex occurs, you can spend one Battle focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit is eligible to perform an Agile Manoeuvre if it has this ability and has not already performed an Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.

glossary.name: Assault
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[ASSAULT]** in their profile are known as Assault weapons. If a unit that Advanced this turn contains any models equipped with Assault weapons, it is still eligible to shoot in this turn’s Shooting phase. When such a unit is selected to shoot, you can only resolve attacks using Assault weapons its models are equipped with.

glossary.name: Pistol
glossary.effect:
Weapons with **[PISTOL]** in their profile are known as Pistols. If a unit contains any models equipped with Pistols, that unit is eligible to shoot in its controlling player’s Shooting phase even while it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. When such a unit is selected to shoot, it can only resolve attacks using its Pistols and can only target one of the enemy units it is within Engagement Range of. In such circumstances, a Pistol can target an enemy unit even if other friendly units are within Engagement Range of the same enemy unit. 

If a model is equipped with one or more Pistols, unless it is a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** model, it can either shoot with its Pistols or with all of its other ranged weapons. Declare whether such a model will shoot with its Pistols or its other ranged weapons before selecting targets.

glossary.name: Devastating Wounds
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** in their profile are known as Devastating Wounds weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if that attack scores a Critical Wound, no saving throw of any kind can be made against that attack (including invulnerable saving throws). Such attacks are only allocated to models after all other attacks made by the attacking unit have been allocated and resolved. After that attack is allocated and after any modifiers are applied, it inflicts a number of mortal wounds on the target equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack, instead of inflicting damage normally.

glossary.name: Sustained Hits
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[SUSTAINED HITS X]** in their profile are known as Sustained Hits weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if a Critical Hit is rolled, that attack scores a number of additional hits on the target as denoted by ‘x’

glossary.name: Anti-
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[ANTI-KEYWORD X+]** in their profile are known as Anti weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon against a target with the keyword after the word ‘Anti-’, an unmodified Wound roll of ‘x+’ scores a Critical Wound.

glossary.name: Heavy
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[HEAVY]** in their profile are known as Heavy weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if the attacking model’s unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to that attack’s Hit roll.

glossary.name: Ignores Cover
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[IGNORES COVER]** in their profile are known as Ignores Cover weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, the target cannot have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

glossary.name: Melta
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[MELTA X]** in their profile are known as Melta weapons. Each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within half that weapon’s range, that attack’s Damage characteristic is increased by the amount denoted by ‘x’.

glossary.name: Twin-linked
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[TWIN-LINKED]** in their profile are known as Twin-linked weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, you can re-roll that attack’s Wound roll.

glossary.name: Lance
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[LANCE]** in their profile are known as Lance weapons. Each time an attack is made with such a weapon, if the bearer made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to that attack’s Wound roll.

glossary.name: Deep Strike
glossary.effect:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

glossary.name: Deadly Demise
glossary.effect: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

glossary.name: Blast
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[BLAST]** in their profile are known as Blast weapons, and they make a random number of attacks. Each time you determine how many attacks are made with a Blast weapon, add 1 to the result for every five models that were in the target unit when you selected it as the target (rounding down). Blast weapons can never be used to make attacks against a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more units from the attacking model’s army (including its own unit).

glossary.name: Indirect Fire
glossary.effect:
Weapons with **[INDIRECT FIRE]** in their profile are known as Indirect Fire weapons, and attacks can be made with them even if the target is not visible to the attacking model. These attacks can destroy enemy models in a target unit even though none may have been visible to the attacking unit when you selected that target.


If no models in a target unit are visible to the attacking unit when you select that target, then each time a model in the attacking unit makes an attack against that target using an Indirect Fire weapon, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll, an unmodified Hit roll of 1-3 always fails, and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack. Weapons with the **[TORRENT]** ability cannot be fired using the **[INDIRECT FIRE]** ability.

glossary.name: Lone Operative
glossary.effect: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

glossary.name: Disparate Paths
glossary.effect: When mustering you army, you can include Harlequins units in your army, even though they do not have the Asuryani Faction keyword. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot select Harlequins or Ynnari as your Army Faction.

glossary.name: Psychic
glossary.effect: Some weapons and abilities can only be used by **^^Psykers^^**. Such weapons and abilities are tagged with the word 'Psychic'. If a Psychic weapon or ability causes any unit to suffer one or more wounds, each of those wounds is considered to have been inflicted by a Psychic Attack.

glossary.name: Fights First
glossary.effect: Units with this ability that are eligible to fight do so in the Fights First step, provided every model in the unit has this ability.

glossary.name: Infiltrators
glossary.effect: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, then when you set it up, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from the enemy deployment zone and all enemy models.

glossary.name: Stealth
glossary.effect: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack’s Hit roll.

glossary.name: Scouts
glossary.effect:
Some units have ‘Scouts x"’ listed in their abilities. If every model in a unit has this ability, then at the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, it can make a Normal move of up to x", with the exception that, while making that move, the distance moved by each model in that unit can be greater than that model's Move characteristic, as long as it is not greater than x". 

DEDICATED TRANSPORT models can make use of any Scouts x" ability listed in their abilities, or a Scouts x" ability that a unit that starts the battle embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT  model has (provided only models with this ability are embarked within that Dedicated Transport model), regardless of how that embarked unit gained this ability (e.g. listed in their abilities, conferred by an Enhancement or by an attached Character, etc.). 

A unit that moves using this ability must end that move more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If both players have units that can do this, the player who is taking the first turn moves their units first.

glossary.name: Firing Deck
glossary.effect: Some **^^Transport^^** models have ‘Firing Deck x’ listed in their abilities. Each time such a model is selected to shoot in the Shooting phase, you can select up to ‘x’ models embarked within it whose units have not already shot this phase. Then, for each of those embarked models, you can select one ranged weapon that embarked model is equipped with (excluding weapons with the **[ONE SHOT]** ability). Until that **^^Transport^^** model has resolved all of its attacks, it counts as being equipped with all of the weapons you selected in this way, in addition to its other weapons. Until the end of the phase, those selected models’ units are not eligible to shoot.

glossary.name: Hover
glossary.effect:
Some **^^Aircraft^^** models have 'Hover' listed in their abilities. When you are instructed to Declare Battle Formations, before doing anything else, you must first declare which models from your army with this ability will be in Hover mode.

If a model is in Hover mode, then until the end of the battle, its Move characteristic is changed to 20", it loses the **^^Aircraft^^** keyword and it loses all associated rules for being an **^^Aircraft^^** model. Models in Hover mode do not start the battle in Reserves, but you can choose to place them into Strategic Reserves following the normal rules if you wish.

glossary.name: Rapid Fire
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[RAPID FIRE X]** in their profile are known as Rapid Fire weapons. Each time such a weapon targets a unit within half that weapon’s range, the Attacks characteristic of that weapon is increased by the amount denoted by ‘x’.

glossary.name: Extra Attacks
glossary.effect: Weapons with **[EXTRA ATTACKS]** in their profile are known as Extra Attacks weapons. Each time the bearer of one or more Extra Attacks weapons fights, it makes attacks with each of the Extra Attacks melee weapons it is equipped with and it makes attacks with one of the melee weapons it is equipped with that does not have the [EXTRA ATTACKS] ability (if any). The number of attacks made with an Extra Attacks weapon cannot be modified by other rules, unless that weapon’s name is explicitly specified in that rule.

glossary.name: Hazardous
glossary.effect:
Weapons with **[HAZARDOUS]** in their profile are known as Hazardous weapons. Each time a unit is selected to shoot or fight, after that unit has resolved all of its attacks, for each Hazardous weapon that targets were selected for when resolving those attacks, that unit must take one Hazardous test. To do so, roll one D6: on a 1, that test is failed. For each failed test you must resolve the following sequence (resolve each failed test one at a time): 

■ If possible, select one model in that unit that has lost one or more wounds and is equipped with one or more Hazardous weapons. 
■ Otherwise, if possible, select one model in that unit (excluding **^^Character^^** models) equipped with one or more Hazardous weapons. 
■ Otherwise, select one **^^Character^^** model in that unit equipped with one or more Hazardous weapons. 

If a model was selected, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and when allocating those mortal wounds, they must be allocated to the selected model. 

If a unit from a player’s army is selected as the target of the Fire Overwatch Stratagem in their opponent’s Charge phase, any mortal wounds inflicted by Hazardous tests are allocated after the charging unit has ended its Charge move.

glossary.name: Crucible
glossary.effect: A **^^Character^^** created using Crucible rules has the Crucible ability. Your army may include up to three units with the Crucible ability and these units cannot be given Enhancements.
